title: Antenna for a mobile terminal that overlaps a side button
abstract: Provided is a mobile terminal which can additionally mount antennas without needing to change the positions of buttons and thus without reducing the usability thereof, the mobile terminal comprising: an antenna module disposed inside the side surface of a case; and a user input module overlappingly disposed inside the antenna module and including a force sensor for pressure sensing.
claims: 1. A mobile terminal comprising: a side case comprising a first recess formed in an inner surface of a first portion of the side case; a display unit mounted to a front surface of the side case; an antenna module inserted into the first recess at the inner surface of the side case; a user input module disposed further inwards than the antenna module so as to overlap the antenna module, the user input module comprising a force sensor configured to sense pressure; an actuator located between the antenna module and the force sensor, the actuator directly contacting the antenna and the force sensor to transmit force from the antenna to the force sensor; and a controller configured to recognize user input of pushing the first portion based on pressure sensed by the force sensor, wherein the first portion of the side case is thinner than a remaining portion of the side case.
